title: Cyathocoma neesii
taxonomy: Cyathocoma neesii is classified as a member of the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the subfamily Cynodoideae and the genus Cyathocoma. This classification places it within the monocotyledonous flowering plants. Cyathocoma neesii is native to southern Africa and is often found in dry to moist areas. The species is further categorized within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, and class Liliopsida.

intro: Cyathocoma neesii, also known as the Cyathocoma plant, is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
